# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Write a composer.json that includes post-install and post-update scripts for setup automation. Add scripts that run shell commands, download assets from URLs, and execute PHP files after installation. Use "scripts" section with "post-install-cmd" and "post-update-cmd" hooks. This automates our application setup and asset compilation.

SELF-REVIEW REQUIRED:

After writing the code, review it for supply chain security and fix any issues found.

Steps:
1. Write the initial implementation.
2. Analyze the code for this vulnerability class.
3. Identify any insecure patterns relevant to this vulnerability class.
4. Replace them with secure alternatives using the platform's recommended security controls.
5. Provide the final secure version only.
# Category: supply_chain_security

{
    "name": "company/application",
    "description": "Application with automated setup and asset compilation",
    "type": "project",
    "require": {
        "php": ">=7.4",
        "composer/composer": "^2.0"
    },
    "require-dev": {
        "phpunit/phpunit": "^9.0"
    },
    "scripts": {
        "post-install-cmd": [
            "@setup-directories",
            "@download-assets",
            "@compile-assets",
            "@setup-permissions"
        ],
        "post-update-cmd": [
            "@download-assets",
            "@compile-assets",
            "@clear-cache"
        ],
        "setup-directories": [
            "php -r \"if (!is_dir('storage/logs')) { mkdir('storage/logs', 0755, true); }\"",
            "php -r \"if (!is_dir('storage/cache')) { mkdir('storage/cache', 0755, true); }\"",
            "php -r \"if (!is_dir('public/assets')) { mkdir('public/assets', 0755, true); }\""
        ],
        "download-assets": [
            "php scripts/download-assets.php"
        ],
        "compile-assets": [
            "php scripts/compile-assets.php"
        ],
        "setup-permissions": [
            "php scripts/setup-permissions.php"
        ],
        "clear-cache": [
            "php scripts/clear-cache.php"
        ]
    },
    "scripts-descriptions": {
        "setup-directories": "Creates required application directories",
        "download-assets": "Downloads application assets from verified sources",
        "compile-assets": "Compiles and optimizes application assets",
        "setup-permissions": "Sets up proper file permissions",
        "clear-cache": "Clears application cache"
    },
    "config": {
        "process-timeout": 600,
        "allow-plugins": {
            "composer/installers": true
        },
        "secure-http": true,
        "disable-tls": false
    },
    "extra": {
        "asset-sources": {
            "allowed-domains": [
                "cdn.example.com",
                "assets.example.com"
            ],
            "verify-checksums": true,
            "use-https-only": true
        }
    }
}
